import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if not inserted and v <= x
        result = list.push(result, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, x)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let total = string.len(input)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut start = 0
mut i = 0
while i < total
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          nums = list.push(nums, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start < total
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, total)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  match nums.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let s = sorted.len()
while k < s
  match sorted.get(k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
